title: Cracca angustifolia
taxonomy: Cracca angustifolia is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and morphological features. The genus Cracca is a small group of flowering plants that are native to Africa and Asia. Cracca angustifolia is further classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae. Its classification is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies, which confirm its placement within the Fabaceae family.
